{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Damascan Heir
| appears_in = Traveler's Gate
| introduced = [[The Crimson Vault (novel)|The Crimson Vault]]
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Talos]] is the [[Damascan Heir]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c19">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
